stem: A agricultural research study surveys 200 seeds planted and observes 25 positive outcomes out of 200 (12.5%). Estimate the true germination rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.125. Wilson 95% CI: [0.0861, 0.178]. Point estimate: 0.1321.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
